executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Container security push — expanding from code scanning to full container lifecycle security
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: Snyk invested heavily in container image scanning, Kubernetes admission controllers, and IaC (Infrastructure as Code) security. Expanding the 'shift left' narrative from code to infrastructure.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: 10 new integrations focused on container orchestration platforms and cloud providers.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Platform engineering teams managing Kubernetes clusters and cloud infrastructure
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Stable — no major pricing changes observed this month

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Hiring container security researchers and cloud infrastructure engineers
intelligence_signals.target_users: Platform engineers and DevOps teams managing cloud-native infrastructure
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Container security as premium add-on tier driving upsell
intelligence_signals.differentiators: End-to-end from code to container to cloud in a single platform

areas_of_focus: Evaluate container security as CSPM extension

product_specific.ASPM: Snyk's IaC scanning extends their ASPM-like coverage further left than Securin's current capabilities
product_specific.CSPM: Container security and cloud infrastructure scanning overlap with CSPM scope
